data.body: DISCOVERED (emergent, blocks all 4 leaves): .gitignore has '.rebar/*' (only trusted_environments.yaml exempt), so ALL deliverable overlay files (.rebar/criteria_routing.json, .rebar/prompts/plan-review-project-portability.md, .rebar/plan_review_moves.json, .rebar/evals/plan-review-project-portability.eval.yaml) are gitignored and cannot be committed as-is. The plan-review loader reads ONLY <repo>/.rebar/, and CI must see committed files, so they MUST be tracked. Resolution: add surgical '!' negations to .gitignore (project's own convention per !.rebar/trusted_environments.yaml), scoped per-ticket to the file(s) each change introduces (3863: criteria_routing.json + prompts/plan-review-project-portability.md; 2ad8: plan_review_moves.json; 21dd: evals/*.eval.yaml). Not creating separate tickets — this is a necessary sub-step of each ticket's declared 'add .rebar/... file' deliverable; documenting as ticket comments instead. Also fixing a test-hygiene bug: test_production_fan_in pointed the runner at REPO_ROOT which wrote .rebar/cache (conftest leak-guard rejects) -> sandbox it by copying the committed files into a tmp repo (byte-faithful, hygienic).
